title: calamagrostis planifolia
intro: Calamagrostis planifolia, also known as mountain grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis planifolia include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as protection against certain diseases. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
